# Instructional Designer
...
At Henry Schein One UK, we are a tech company with a mission to redefine dental care, creating a future where personalised, AI-driven treatment and intelligent practice management come together to enhance patient care and build a thriving dental practice.
...
Clinical; AI‑powered diagnostics and note-taking, giving dentists an extra set of expert eyes on every x‑ray, further detecting subtle signs across conditions and boosting clinical accuracy in seconds.
...
As an Instructional Designer, you will transform product knowledge and learningrequirements into high-quality, engaging digital learning experiences. Usinginstructional design and adult learning principles, you will create content that drivesknowledge retention, behaviour change, and product adoption.Success in this role means learners can easily understand and apply what they’velearned, leading to improved onboarding outcomes, stronger customer confidence,and scalable learning solutions. You will play a key role in enabling the business todeliver consistent, effective, and engaging learning experiences at scale, supportinggrowth and customer success.
...
## What You'll Do
...
Design and develop high-quality digital learning assets (e.g. eLearning modules,videos, simulations) that support product onboarding and drive measurableimprovements in learner understanding and adoption
...
Build courses using tools such as Articulate 360, Rise, and similar platforms
...
Create reusable, scalable learning assets and templates to support efficientcontent development
...
Translate product and SME input (provided by Digital Learning Specialists) intoclear, structured learning experiences
...
Apply instructional design principles, templates, and design standards to ensureconsistent, high-quality learning experiences
...
Adapt content for different learner groups and use cases
...
Incorporate assessments, knowledge checks, and scenarios to reinforcelearning outcomes
...
Optimise content based on learner feedback, engagement data, andperformance insights to improve completion rates, knowledge retention, andlearner experience
...
Collaborate with Digital Learning Specialists to refine and improve content,supporting knowledge sharing and capability development across the team
...
the evolution of Dent
...
## What You'll Bring With You
...
Formal training or certification in instructional design, learning design, oreducation technology is desirable.
...
Experience in instructional design, learning design, or digital contentdevelopment
...
Hands-on experience with eLearning authoring tools (e.g. Articulate 360, Rise,Camtasia)
...
Strong understanding of adult learning principles and instructional designmethodologies (e.g. learning objectives, assessment design, knowledge checks,structured learning flows)
...
Ability to translate complex information into engaging, learner-friendly content

If you are passionate about dental technology and want to be part of a team that is making a difference, then Henry Schein One is the place for you. We offer a variety of career opportunities, from software development to customer support. We are always looking for talented and motivated individuals to join our team.
...
- We are developing cloud-based practice management software that makes it easier for dental professionals to manage their practices.
- We are developing artificial intelligence-powered tools that help dentists diagnose and treat dental conditions more accurately.
- We are developing teledentistry solutions that make it possible for dentists to provide care to patients in remote areas.
- We are developing virtual reality and augmented reality tools that help dentists train and educate their patients.

results.title: Henry Schein AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Henry Schein has positioned itself as a leader in dental AI transformation, leveraging its subsidiary Henry Schein One to build the world's first AI-augmented practice management system [1]. The company announced a groundbreaking partnership with Amazon Web Services in November 2025, integrating AWS's generative AI technologies across the Henry Schein One platform—including Dentrix, Dentrix Ascend, and Dentally [2]. This collaboration aims to embed AI across every step of the dental journey, from booking and imaging to payments and treatment presentation, with early pilot results indicating a projected 65-70% reduction in clinical documentation time [3]. Beyond technology initiatives, Henry Schein reported strong Q3 2025 financial performance with Global Technology sales increasing 9.7% year-over-year, reflecting accelerated adoption of cloud-based software and AI-enabled solutions [4]. The company's strategic focus on AI and digital transformation aligns with its broader BOLD+1 strategy, which has successfully generated 41% of operating income from high-growth, high-margin businesses as of 2025 [5].
...

highlights:
Director, Global Supply Chain Data Science, AI ML & Advanced Analytics at [Henry Schein](https://www.linkedin.com/company/henry-schein)
...
#### Director, Global Supply Chain Data Science, AI ML & Advanced Analytics (Current)
...
Leading the strategy and execution of advanced technologies that enable intelligent automation, predictive insights, and AI-driven decision-making across our global supply chain. My focus is on unlocking high-impact opportunities to reduce cost, boost productivity, enhance customer experience, and support scalable, sustainable growth. In this role, I partner with business units and functional leaders to identify and deliver transformative AI/ML use cases, build cross-functional capability, and establish a center of excellence to accelerate innovation and foster a future-ready, resilient supply chain. Show less
...
In this role, I led supply chain digital transformation initiatives to embed AI, machine learning, and intelligent automation across our global supply chain. Through strategic alignment and hands-on execution, I partnered with functional leaders to pilot emerging technologies, streamline operations, and build foundational capabilities for long-term innovation. My work centered on enhancing operational performance, enabling smarter decision-making, and laying the foundation for a digitally enabled future. I was selected for the Henry Schein AI Learning Journey and appointed to the Henry Schein AI Committee, contributing to the development of enterprise-wide AI strategy and education. I presented strategic findings to senior leadership, including our CEO and Board of Directors, showcasing the value of AI in driving efficiency and improving customer outcomes. 📢 𝑲𝒆𝒚 𝑪𝒐𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔: ➙ Launched a predictive lead time tool powered by Google Vertex AI, enabling buyers to calibrate item-level lead times, improve forecast accuracy, and support inventory optimization efforts. ➙ Developed a natural language chatbot in Power BI, enabling self-service analytics and real-time Q&A for our Reverse Logistics team. ➙ Built and prioritized an AI/ML use case pipeline, delivering vendor evaluations, and PoC readiness for high-impact predictive analytics and RPA opportunities. ➙ Completed Google and MIT AI programs, gaining hands-on experience with RapidMiner, KNIME, and Dataiku. ➙ Co-led the Supply Chain Technology Roadmap to identify gaps and align future investments. ➙ Retired/Transitioned +90% of legacy reporting tools, migrated analytics to Power BI, and saved $175K in platform costs. ➙ Participated in Kaizens and process improvement to streamline supplier pricing, backorder ETA tracking, and manual workflows. ➙ Mentored junior team members and interns, fostering a collaborative culture and promoting professional development within the digital transformation team. results.title:
Great technology is often invisible. The infrastructure behind secure data, connected systems, and trusted AI experiences is what enables innovation to scale.

Thanks to Alan R. and Bryan Saftler for… | Henry Schein One
highlights:
Great technology is often invisible. The infrastructure behind secure data, connected systems, and trusted AI experiences is what enables innovation to scale. Thanks to Alan R. and Bryan Saftler for… | Henry Schein One
...
Great technology is often invisible. The infrastructure behind secure data, connected systems, and trusted AI experiences is what enables innovation to scale. Thanks to Alan R. and Bryan Saftler for a thoughtful conversation on what it takes to build the future of dental technology.
...
Chief Technology Officer at Henry Schein One
...
Nobody brags about their plumbing. But if your house doesn't have it, nothing else works. That's how I think about APIs — the foundation that makes everything else possible. AI agents, third-party integrations, real-time data. None of it happens without what's underneath. On the latest Dental Tex-Ray, I sat down with Bryan Saftler, who came up through Microsoft and Databricks, to talk about what's actually powering the next era of dental technology. And Bryan said something I keep coming back to: trust is the new total addressable market. In a regulated industry like dentistry, if patients can't trust you with their data, everything else falls apart. The practices that win won't have the prettiest UI. They'll have the right foundation. Listen wherever you get your podcasts.

Profissional com perfil analítico e experiência consolidada na área de dados, com formação em Análise e Desenvolvimento de Sistemas e pós-graduação em Engenharia de Dados. Atuo na interseção entre dados, tecnologia e negócio, entregando soluções que geram valor estratégico e operacional. results.title: Summer Intern - Pricing & Analytics | Jobflarely
highlights: & Analytics Intern will support the Pricing team in delivering data-driven insights that inform strategic pricing decisions, customer retention efforts, and margin optimization. This position is responsible for performing a variety of tasks/projects that address the needs of the department. The assignments are related to the academic major and the degree of the Intern. The assignments may include conducting research. As possible, a reasonable balance will be made between the intern's learning goals and the specific assignments. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: Works with leadership to coordinate efforts and resolve issues. Works with the department prioritizing work assignments and act as a liaison with other departments. Performs a variety of tasks/projects that address the needs of the department. Participates in special projects and performs other duties as required. SPECIFIC KNOWLEDGE & SKILLS: Proficiency in Microsoft Excel Experience using Python preferred Exposure to Big Data preferred Rising seniors pursuing a bachelor's degree preferred GENERAL SKILLS & COMPETENCIES: Good time management Attention to detail and accuracy Ability to plan and arrange activities Interpersonal communication skills Good verbal and written skills Ability to maintain confidential and highly sensitive information Ability to work in a team environment Ability to multi-task WORK EXPERIENCE: No experience required. PREFERRED EDUCATION: Typically High School education, vocational training and/or on-the-job training. TRAVEL / PHYSICAL DEMANDS: Travel typically less than 10%. Office environment. No special physical demands required. The posted hourly rate for this internship position is based on both your education and location. Candidates possessing up to and including a high school diploma can receive either $15 or $16/hr depending on location. This rate also applies to candidates enrolled in a college program but have not yet started those studies. Candidates currently pursuing a bachelor’s degree or equivalent can receive either $18 or $20/hr depending on location. This rate also applies to candidates enrolled in an advanced, post-graduate degree program but have not yet started those studies. Candidates possessing a bachelor’s degree or equivalent and currently pursuing an advanced, post-graduate degree (i.e., MS, MBA, JD, etc.) can receive either $22 or $24/hr depending on location. Henry Schein, Inc. is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer and does not discriminate against applicants or employees on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, national origin, ancestry, disability that can be reasonably accommodated without undue hardship, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, citizenship, marital or veteran status, or any other legally protected status. For more information about career opportunities at Henry Schein, please visit our website at: Fraud Alert Henry Schein has recently been made aware of multiple scams where unauthorized individuals are using Henry Schein's name and logo to solicit potential job seekers for employment. Please be advised that Henry Schein's official U.S. website is Any other format is not genuine. Any jobs posted by Henry Schein or its recruiters on the internet may be accessed through Henry Schein's on-line "career opportunities" portal through this official website. Applicants who wish to seek employment with Henry Schein are advised to verify the job posting through this portal. No money transfers, payments of any kind, or credit card numbers, will EVER be requested from applicants by Henry Schein or any recruiters on its behalf, at any point in the recruitment process. The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.

You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

highlights:

...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
machine learning,
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology, engineering, math, computer science, analytics, engineering or other related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
